attack_surface.data_description: malicious claim transaction with forged proof/parameters

security_gap.gap_description: Smart contract vulnerability allows a user to claim more tokens than they are entitled to or claim tokens belonging to others.

actor_risk.description: Actor interacting with a contract function that awards assets based on entitlement.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Allows attacker to steal tokens directly from the contract or other users.

assumptions: Smart contract code for claim validation is incorrect or contains vulnerabilities.
The proof system used by the contract is weak.

mitigation.strategy: Perform thorough code audits and formal verification of the claim logic in the smart contract; Use secure and well-tested proof systems.

description: An attacker could exploit a vulnerability in the BGT Incentive Distributor contract to claim more Incentive Tokens than they are legitimately entitled to.
